description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian, depicted with a medium build and realistic human proportions. He is dressed in a long-sleeve, fitted top and straight-cut trousers, both of which are plain and unadorned. The figure is barefoot, with detailed toes and naturalistic feet, and his hands are extended horizontally to the sides, fingers splayed. His facial features are stylized but recognizable, with short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven face. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the natural contours of the torso and limbs, and the overall appearance is casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The model is free of accessories or carried items, and the posture is neutral and balanced.
description: A barefoot adult male in a fitted long-sleeve top and straight trousers, arms extended horizontally, with short hair and a casual, everyday appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full extension of both arms, with detailed hands and feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side outline of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with both arms extended and the back of the hands visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the torso, and the outline of the extended right arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve casual shirt and straight-cut trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
